description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, reminiscent of the classic Les Paul style. The body is finished in a glossy black color, with chrome hardware and two control knobs visible on the front. The neck is long and slender, featuring a dark fretboard with inlaid position markers. The headstock is angled and fitted with six tuning pegs arranged in a three-per-side configuration. The back of the guitar shows a rear electronics cavity cover, and the overall construction appears robust and well-crafted. The instrument is designed for amplified performance, suitable for urban musicians performing on the street, in parks, or at local venues.
description: A glossy black, single-cutaway electric guitar with chrome hardware, two control knobs, and a classic Les Paul-inspired shape. Features a dark fretboard, angled headstock, and rear electronics cavity cover.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glossy black body, chrome hardware, two control knobs, pickups, and the full fretboard.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim body thickness and the protruding neck and headstock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the body, electronics cavity cover, and the back of the neck and headstock.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile emphasizing the body thickness and the alignment of the neck and headstock.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with three tuning pegs per side, no visible logo, classic Les Paul-style contour
